name: ase-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE): routing automated-SE work among the SE flagships, the Accept/Revision/Reject research-track model with an early-rejection stage before rebuttal and a criteria-bound revision round, double-anonymous HotCRP submission on the ACM acmart sigconf template under a 10+2 page budget, the mandatory Data Availability Statement, IEEE-Xplore-and-ACM-DL dual proceedings, ACM artifact badging, and the co-located NIER, Tools-and-Datasets, and Journal-First tracks. Grounded in the ASE 2025/2026 researchr calls, ase26.hotcrp.com, IEEE Xplore, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
